meta.notes: Each test case ran as a separate exec call. T1 found 10 results (TikTok+Instagram). T2 found 9 results (X). T3 used first T1 URL (TikTok @pandafitness7, 15s, 1010KB); Anthropic proxy timed out on LLM synthesis pass, fell back to OpenAI successfully. T4 trending: TikTok native trending returned 0, fell back to keyword searches across 5 categories × 3 platforms. system_prompt_tokens = first-turn cacheRead.

task.name: viral-trend-finder
task.purpose: Find trending content by topic/platform and run full video analysis pipeline
task.expected_output: JSON with trend results per query; storyboard + hook copy for T3 analyze

install.notes: VTF v1.0.6 already installed. CMS fetch only (0.121s).

asset_acquisition.notes: N/A — video download is internal to T3 skill execution (not a separate phase)

steps.name: t1_find_fitness
steps.notes: exit=0 platforms=tiktok,instagram results=10 (5 TikTok + 5 Instagram). Apify scraper. Top result: @pandafitness7 239.6K views.

steps.name: t2_find_cooking_x
steps.notes: exit=0 platform=x results=9. RapidAPI fast (2s). Top result: 798K views.

steps.name: t3_analyze
steps.notes: exit=0 url=https://www.tiktok.com/@pandafitness7/video/7610312660403375390 shots=7 frames=15 video_size=1010KB video_duration=~15s. Sub-stages inferred from stderr: metadata_s=~2 download_s=~5 frame_extract_s=~3 gemini_vision_s=~130 llm_synthesis_s=~80. ⚠️ Anthropic proxy ReadTimeout on LLM synthesis (2 retries), fell back to OpenAI successfully.

steps.name: t4_trending
steps.notes: exit=0 results=10. TikTok native trending returned 0 — fell back to 5 keyword searches × 3 platforms (15 searches total). 2 long videos skipped (>180s). results: tiktok=views up to 33.4M.

execution.notes: T3 analyze is the clear bottleneck (220.7s = 70.6% of execution). Gemini Vision (15 frames concurrent) + LLM synthesis with OpenAI fallback. T2 is fastest (2s, RapidAPI X).
